tooltip.ready:
OBS is ready
Left click {primaryAction}
Right click toggles recording
Middle click toggles the replay buffer
tooltip.needs_restart:
OBS is running, but WebSocket control is unavailable
Restart OBS once to restore controls

header.title: OBS Control
header.active: Active outputs: {outputs}. Manage capture, replay, or streaming from here.
header.ready: OBS is connected and ready for recording, replay, or streaming.
header.qt_websockets_missing: Qt WebSockets support is unavailable in this Quickshell runtime. Install qt6-websockets to enable OBS controls.
header.config_missing: OBS websocket config is missing or disabled. Open OBS, enable obs-websocket, and try again.
header.needs_restart: OBS is open, but WebSocket control is unavailable until it is restarted once.
header.offline: OBS is offline. Launch it here and the widget will track its state.

status.label: Status
status.connected_hint: Left click {primaryAction}. Right click toggles recording, middle click toggles replay, and the panel exposes streaming and save actions.
status.qt_websockets_missing_hint: Qt WebSockets support is missing in this Quickshell runtime. Install qt6-websockets, then restart Noctalia to enable OBS controls.
status.config_missing_hint: OBS websocket config is missing or disabled. Open OBS, enable obs-websocket, then restart or refresh the plugin.
status.disconnected_hint: WebSocket control is unavailable right now. Launch or restart OBS to restore quick actions.
status.managed_hint: Plugin-managed launches can close OBS after the last active recording, replay, or stream stops.

header.label: OBS Control
header.description: Choose how OBS appears in the bar, Control Center, and quick actions.

behavior.label: Quick Actions
behavior.description: Set what clicks do and how OBS launches when you ask the plugin to open it.

bar.label: Bar
bar.description: Keep Always Show enabled if you want the OBS button to stay in the same spot all the time.

control_center.label: Control Center
control_center.description: Choose when the shortcut should appear. Leave Ready off if you only want it during active sessions.

videos.label: Videos & Automation
videos.description: Choose where recordings open and what the plugin should do after capture stops.

runtime.qt_websockets_missing: Install qt6-websockets and restart Noctalia to enable OBS control.
runtime.websocket_config_missing: Enable obs-websocket in OBS, then refresh or restart Noctalia.

poll_interval.label: Refresh Interval
poll_interval.description: How often to refresh OBS state, in milliseconds.

left_click_action.label: Left Click
left_click_action.description: Pick the primary action for the bar and Control Center button.

launch_behavior.label: Launch OBS
launch_behavior.description: Only used for the manual Launch OBS action. Automatic starts still open minimized to tray.

bar_label_mode.label: Label Style
bar_label_mode.description: Choose how active OBS states appear in the bar.

videos_path.label: Videos Folder
videos_path.description: Leave empty to use your default Videos directory.

videos_opener.label: Folder Opener
videos_opener.description: Command used to open the Videos folder, for example xdg-open or your file manager.

auto_close_managed.label: Close OBS After Managed Sessions
auto_close_managed.description: If the plugin launched OBS for you, close it again after the last active output stops.

open_videos_after_stop.label: Offer Open Videos After Save
open_videos_after_stop.description: Show an Open Videos action after recording stops or a replay is saved.

show_elapsed_in_bar.label: Show Elapsed Time
show_elapsed_in_bar.description: Show the timer in the bar when Label Style is set to Duration Labels.

show_bar_recording.label: While Recording
show_bar_recording.description: Keep the bar button visible during recording.

show_bar_replay.label: While Replay Is Active
show_bar_replay.description: Keep the bar button visible while only the replay buffer is running.

show_bar_streaming.label: While Streaming
show_bar_streaming.description: Keep the bar button visible during streaming.

always_show_in_bar.label: Always Show In Bar
always_show_in_bar.description: Keep the bar button visible even when OBS is idle or offline so its position stays stable.

show_control_center_recording.label: While Recording
show_control_center_recording.description: Show the Control Center shortcut during recording.

show_control_center_replay.label: While Replay Is Active
show_control_center_replay.description: Show the Control Center shortcut while the replay buffer is active.

show_control_center_streaming.label: While Streaming
show_control_center_streaming.description: Show the Control Center shortcut during streaming.

show_control_center_ready.label: When OBS Is Ready
show_control_center_ready.description: Keep the shortcut visible while OBS is connected but idle.

record_stopped_autoclose.title: OBS recording stopped
record_stopped_autoclose.body: Recording saved to Videos. OBS closed.

replay_stopped_autoclose.title: OBS replay buffer stopped
replay_stopped_autoclose.body: Instant replay is off. OBS closed.

replay_saved.title: OBS replay saved
replay_saved.body: Saved the last replay buffer to Videos.

offline.title: OBS is offline
offline.body: Launch OBS to use recording controls.

qt_websockets_missing.title: Qt WebSockets support missing
qt_websockets_missing.body: Qt WebSockets support is unavailable in this Quickshell runtime. Install qt6-websockets to enable OBS controls.

websocket_config_missing.title: OBS websocket not configured
websocket_config_missing.body: OBS websocket config is missing or disabled. Open OBS, enable obs-websocket, and try again.
